title: Actually 3D Blocks & Items!
description: 3D resourcepack, which makes a lot of Blocks and Items more detailed, smoother and Actually 3D! (3D Furnaces, 3D Workbenches, 3D Flowers, 3D Ladders, 3D Mushrooms, 3D Items, 3D Plants, 3D Rails, 3D Crops, 3D Pumpkins, 3D Mace, 3D Totems, 3D Amtehyst, etc.)
body:
![Actually 3D Blocks & Items logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b79ab189af4417252a250cbb79c1b4bde1b808ef.png)
![line separator thin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ee9bd1ade57108cfa259a1e6cddf3ef1927301e.png) ![Description part one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d33a27888960307d8f5ec924fbcbfcfbffd3cd3.png) ‎
List of All of the Models Included as of version 1.5: ![The v1.5 model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79d213819f6303f91453e34dc6e69e80b6af7f43.png)
![Name Dependant Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/594997958beff874226a680f9aef61a1a5f95d6f.png)
Click to expand the variants! ![Name Dependant Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074fe6b5514cc7305bcd6c5ad5e53ba4e682cc44.png)
![Mace Enchantment Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc65a80cfeda4ab5f9e3c226591efef5bdeeccc.png)
Click to learn more about the variants! ![This resource pack adds Enchantment Dependant models to the Mace! (Images of the density Enchantment lineup) The enchantment Variants stack on top of each other, creating a total of 2880 possible combinations! (Images of fire aspect, wind burst and Mending variants)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dffdeb30abc960704484a1038fbcb15d990b8fb4.png) ![A Video Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1a6b97f286e75acbd3c28c677fe8503f286cd78.png) ![All of the Mace Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e932efaf2b100136d487e03b5b9352d21ab9923.png) ![do you like just the maces? get the standalone 3d mace pack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b21b60dff4469c55f6427fa67392e032133d7f8b.png)
![Randomized Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9952c181a3555fe537afff46135838a1b7cca48d.png)
Click to take a look at all the Randomized Blocks! ![Foliage Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aed95af11b511b9f48170af215ef79e9f3d05f29.png)
Click to take a closer look at the Foliage Patches! ![Foliage Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e36f17c9e2a80036dc7f6b3b59cf3d05e5571887.png)
![Grass and Dead Bush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25837e69b765490b27ed0de29509f9bcac474cc7.png)
Click to take a closer look at the Randomized Grass and Dead Bushes! ![Grass and Dead Bush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53db3994c07593dc15cef30850a2a2263e46c09d.png)
![Ladders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/342536fae6f07a37b587cbe74c70183fb8bafd4d.png)
Click to take a closer look at the Ladders! ![Ladders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/012db1bd28c8e659121e0aa0085ba998ce400c33.png)
![Bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d818e3df9f984a210c573832495928f612ca6dc2.png)
Click to take a closer look at the redesigned Bookshelf! ![Bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7683617e24f138b47fb3d5e99db62c4d5283d402.png)
![Moss Overhang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bcf4992ce72e9f46301ad14a746cadcab86e17f.png)
Click to take a closer look at the Moss Overhang! ![Moss Overhang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b2fb552a5cca93d458e6a1db995c00f01daf09b.png)
____ ____ ![Get the standalones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f098ea24c9a88a6ccee116c406081cfa41abc47e.png)

Terms of use
By using the resource pack, you agree to follow these terms
‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ #
You are allowed to...
- Use this resource pack in your Modrinth modpacks, as long as you give credit
- Use this resource pack in YouTube videos and on other social media
- Edit the pack as long as it's for personal use only
- Publish forks or edits of the pack, once you get permission
#
You are NOT allowed to...
- Redistribute the pack (as your own) without permission
- Publish forks or edits of the pack without permission
